name: Minion
description: Weak individually but dangerous in squads. 8:1 hero ratio.
notes: Squad mechanics. Minions share a squad stamina pool. When a minion takes damage equal to its individual stamina, it drops and the next minion in the squad steps up.

name: Horde
description: Slightly tougher than minions, fight in pairs. 2:1 hero ratio.

name: Platoon
description: Standard enemies, one-for-one against heroes. 1:1 hero ratio.

name: Elite
description: Powerful enemies worth two heroes. 1:2 hero ratio.

name: Leader
description: Powerful enemies with villain actions. 1:2 hero ratio + VA.

name: Solo
description: A single enemy designed to fight an entire party. 1:6 hero ratio.

name: Swarm
description: A multi-creature unit that acts as one. 1:1 hero ratio.
notes: Swarm creatures should have area-based abilities and typically occupy a larger space.
